opinion.h2: George N. CAMPBELL, Jr., Commissioner of Transportation, State of Maine, appellant, v. JOHN DONNELLY & SONS, et al No. 80-1597
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: THE CHIEF JUSTICE, Justice REHNQUIST and Justice STEVENS would note probable jurisdiction and set the case for oral argument.
Justice STEWART took no part in the consideration or decision of this case.[ Campbell v. Donnelly & Sons 453 U.S. 916 (1981) ]
